chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 619 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.5304/2022 (S/A) 01.03.2024 Mr. Mukhtiar Husain Katpar, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On the last date of hearing, in view of last and final chance given to the applicant to proceed with the matter, this case was posted for proceeding but was adjourned on the request of learned Counsel that he needed some time to get instructions from his client. Today, although in the morning, in one fresh matter, he sought permission, but has chosen to remain absent in this matter, and on his behalf Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate is holding brief and not proceeding with the matter. In the circumstances, this miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
